case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. RODRIGO CEZAR ARAUJO E.PAULA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT RODRIGO CEZAR ARAUJO E. PAULA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARAUJO E.PAULA, RODRIGO CEZAR $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ARAUJO E.PAULA, RODRIGO CEZAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED SEP-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARAUJO E.PAULA, RODRIGO CEZAR
